should_trigger.prompt: Before drafting the spec, find the project knowledge and hidden domain constraints that affect this change.
This requirement depends on prior architecture decisions and historical specs; select the relevant facts.
The agent is about to read the whole repo; constrain context loading to facts that affect ACs and risk.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Run the final verification pipeline and record verify.md.
The root cause is known; implement the planned fix.
Promote this verified lesson into project knowledge.

assertions: Selects context for a named decision target.
Records adopted facts, conflicts, assumptions, and open questions in Context Basis.
Avoids bulk-loading or pasting unrelated documentation.
